SEARCH

Class MovieManager

java.lang.Object
MovieManager
public class MovieManager extends Object
Manages an in-memory collection of Movie objects for the Movie Tracker DMS. This class contains the original CRUD logic, validation rules, display formatting, and custom calculations used before the database layer was added.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MovieManager()
    Creates an empty movie manager with the accepted release-year range.

    Method

    Adds multiple valid movies to the collection.

    Calculates the average rating of all stored movies.

    Calculates the combined runtime of all stored movies.

    Returns copies of all stored movies for safe display.

    Returns the number of movies stored in the manager.

    Removes a movie from the collection using its ID.

    Updates the genre of an existing movie.

    Updates the title of an existing movie.

    Updates the watched status of an existing movie.

  • Constructor Details

    • MovieManager

      public MovieManager()
      Creates an empty movie manager with the accepted release-year range.

  • Method Details

    • addMovie

      public boolean addMovie(Movie movie)
      Adds one valid movie to the collection when its ID is not already used.
      Parameters:
      movie - the movie record to add
      Returns:
      true if the movie was added, false if validation failed or the ID already exists

    • addMovies

      public int addMovies(ArrayList<Movie> movieList)
      Adds multiple valid movies to the collection.
      Parameters:
      movieList - the movies to add
      Returns:
      the number of movies successfully added

    • removeMovieById

      public boolean removeMovieById(int movieId)
      Removes a movie from the collection using its ID.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to remove
      Returns:
      true if a movie was removed, false if no matching ID exists

    • removeMovieByTitle

      public boolean removeMovieByTitle(String title)
      Removes the first movie with a matching title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the movie to remove
      Returns:
      true if a movie was removed, false if no matching title exists

    • updateMovieId

      public boolean updateMovieId(int currentId, int newId)
      Changes a movie's ID when the current ID exists and the new ID is valid and unused.
      Parameters:
      currentId - the movie's current ID
      newId - the replacement ID
      Returns:
      true if the ID was updated, false otherwise

    • updateTitle

      public boolean updateTitle(int movieId, String title)
      Updates the title of an existing movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to update
      title - the replacement title
      Returns:
      true if the title was updated, false otherwise

    • updateGenre

      public boolean updateGenre(int movieId, String genre)
      Updates the genre of an existing movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to update
      genre - the replacement genre
      Returns:
      true if the genre was updated, false otherwise

    • updateReleaseYear

      public boolean updateReleaseYear(int movieId, int releaseYear)
      Updates the release year of an existing movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to update
      releaseYear - the replacement release year
      Returns:
      true if the year was updated, false otherwise

    • updateRuntimeMinutes

      public boolean updateRuntimeMinutes(int movieId, int runtimeMinutes)
      Updates the runtime of an existing movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to update
      runtimeMinutes - the replacement runtime in minutes
      Returns:
      true if the runtime was updated, false otherwise

    • updateRating

      public boolean updateRating(int movieId, double rating)
      Updates the rating of an existing movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to update
      rating - the replacement rating from 0.0 to 10.0
      Returns:
      true if the rating was updated, false otherwise

    • updateWatched

      public boolean updateWatched(int movieId, boolean watched)
      Updates the watched status of an existing movie.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to update
      watched - the replacement watched status
      Returns:
      true if the watched status was updated, false otherwise

    • findMovieById

      public Movie findMovieById(int movieId)
      Finds a movie by its ID.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID to search for
      Returns:
      the matching movie, or null if no match exists

    • findMovieByTitle

      public Movie findMovieByTitle(String title)
      Finds the first movie with a matching title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title to search for
      Returns:
      the matching movie, or null if no match exists

    • displayMovies

      public ArrayList<Movie> displayMovies()
      Returns copies of all stored movies for safe display.
      Returns:
      a list of copied movie records

    • formatMovieTable

      public String formatMovieTable()
      Builds a formatted table of all stored movies.
      Returns:
      a formatted movie table, or a message if no records exist

    • calculateAverageRating

      public double calculateAverageRating()
      Calculates the average rating of all stored movies.
      Returns:
      the average rating, or 0.0 when no movies are stored

    • calculateTotalRuntime

      public int calculateTotalRuntime()
      Calculates the combined runtime of all stored movies.
      Returns:
      the total runtime in minutes

    • getCalculationSummary

      public String getCalculationSummary()
      Builds the custom calculation summary shown to the user.
      Returns:
      the average rating and total runtime summary, or a message if no movies exist

    • validateMovie

      public boolean validateMovie(Movie movie)
      Checks whether a movie record contains valid values.
      Parameters:
      movie - the movie to validate
      Returns:
      true if the movie is valid, false otherwise

    • getMovieCount

      public int getMovieCount()
      Returns the number of movies stored in the manager.
      Returns:
      the movie count
